headline: TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹ”Ҙ SICS DOJ DOGS рҹҗ¶вҡ–пёҸ on FED DADDY Powell рҹҳӨрҹҸҰ CRIMINAL PROBE рҹ’Ҙ
text:
Jerome Powell рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҸҰ, that stoic FED CHAIR bossman рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ“Ҳ, just DROPPED a BOMBSHELL рҹ’Јрҹ“ў saying US DOJ рҹҰ…вҡ–пёҸ slapped subpoenas рҹ“ңрҹҡЁ on the Fed and THREATENED criminal indictment рҹҚҶрҹ”’ over his Senate testimony рҹ—іпёҸрҹ—ЈпёҸ about renovating those DUSTY 1930s Eccles + Constitution Ave BUILDINGS рҹҸўрҹ•°пёҸ! Asbestos рҹҡ«вҳ пёҸ and lead cleanup рҹ§№рҹ’Җ turning into a $3.1BN рҹӨ‘рҹ’ё BLOWOUT вҖ“ Trump рҹҚҠрҹҗҳ calling it a TOTAL SCAM рҹӨЎрҹ“ү while Powell's like 'UNPRECEDENTED' рҹҳұрҹ”Ҙ cuz it's revenge for NOT SLASHING rates вңӮпёҸрҹ“ү despite Donnie's MELTDOWN tantrums рҹҳЎрҹ‘¶!

Trump on NBC рҹ“°рҹ“ә: 'I know NUTHIN' рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸвқҢ about this probe, but Powell's a NUMBSKULL рҹӨӘрҹ§  who SUCKS at Fedding AND building рҹҸ—пёҸрҹҳ©!' Longtime BEEF рҹҘ©вҡ”пёҸ where Donnie dubs him 'Mr. Too Late' вҸ°рҹҗҢ вҖ“ now Powell PUSHES BACK HARD рҹ’ӘрҹҳӨ: 'This is POLITICAL INTIMIDATION рҹҡ«рҹ‘‘ threatening FED INDEPENDENCE рҹҰ…рҹҶ“! No one's above the LAW вҡ–пёҸрҹ”Ҙ, but Trump's threats are SUS AF рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҳҲ!' Gold рҹӘҷвңЁ JUMPED 1.4% to $4572 рҹҡҖрҹ’° (hit RECORD $4600 рҹҳҚ), silver рҹҢҷрҹ’Қ spiked 5.4% to $83+ рҹ“ҲрҹӨ‘ cuz UNCERTAINTY = SAFE HAVEN ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹҸқпёҸ!

POWWELL OUT in May рҹ—“пёҸрҹҡӘ, Trump eyeing REPLACEMENT рҹ‘ҖрҹҚ‘ but GOP Sen Thom Tillis рҹ—іпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё BLOCKING noms 'til probe RESOLVED рҹ”Қвң… вҖ“ 'TRUMP CREW tryna AXE FED FREEDOM рҹӘ“рҹҶ“!' Liz Warren рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҰ°рҹ”Ҙ calls it 'SOCK PUPPET TAKEOVER рҹӨЎрҹ§Ұ of our central bank рҹ’°рҹҸҰ!' DC US Attorney overseeing this MADNESS рҹҢҖвҡ–пёҸ, echoing Trump's failed hits on Lisa Cook рҹҸҰрҹҡ« (mortgage fraud BLOCKED by court рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ‘‘) and POLITICAL PROSECUTIONS against Letitia James вҡ–пёҸрҹҚ‘ (NY AG who FRYED Trump fraud рҹ”Ҙ) + Comey рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ (Russia probe daddy fired by Donnie рҹҳӨрҹҮ·рҹҮә) вҖ“ all TOSSED by judges рҹҳӮрҹ—‘пёҸ!

Fed DID cut rates 3x in late 2025 вңӮпёҸрҹ“ү but Trump BLAMES Biden рҹ‘ҙрҹ“Ҳ + rates for INFLATION MELTDOWN рҹҳ©рҹ’ё вҖ“ critics YELLING 'Fed's INDEPENDENT, back off Donnie! рҹ–•рҹҰ…' Investment queen April Larusse рҹ’…рҹ“Ҡ: 'They're NOT slacking on rates, this pressure's FAKE NEWS рҹҡ«рҹ“ә!' Trump's second term TWISTS рҹҢҖрҹҚҠ got markets SHAKING рҹҳ°рҹ“ү, Powell standing TALL like a boss рҹҰҒрҹҸҰ refusing to be Trump's RATE-CUT BITCH рҹҗ¶вңӮпёҸ вҖ“ DOJ probe = ULTIMATE POWER PLAY рҹ’Ҙрҹ‘‘ or WITCH HUNT рҹӨ”рҹ§ҷвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ? Gold bugs CUMMING hard рҹ’ҰрҹӘҷ while Wall Street SWEATS рҹҳ°рҹ’§! рҹҡҖрҹ“Ҳрҹ”Ҙ
